code: import React,{useState}from'react';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";function AddMovie(_ref){let{onAdd}=_ref;const[title,setTitle]=useState("");const[showSuccess,setShowSuccess]=useState(false);const handleSubmit=e=>{e.preventDefault();if(!title.trim())return;const newMovie={id:`custom-${Date.now()}`,title:title.trim(),poster:"https://via.placeholder.com/300x450/181818/E50914?text=Custom+Movie"};onAdd(newMovie);setTitle("");setShowSuccess(true);setTimeout(()=>setShowSuccess(false),3000);};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"add-movie-container",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("form",{onSubmit:handleSubmit,className:"add-movie-form",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"input-group",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"text",placeholder:"Add a custom movie title...",value:title,onChange:e=>setTitle(e.target.value)}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{type:"submit",className:"btn-add",children:"Add to List"})]})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:`toast-notification ${showSuccess?"show":""}`,children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"toast-check",children:"\u2713"})," ",title||"Movie"," added to your watchlist"]})]});}export default AddMovie;
